privileged_info_summary: The task provides a Java Maven project with a Calculator class in package com.kranonit.calculator, located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/calculator-test after setup. The Calculator class contains methods: add, subtract, multiply, and divide. The initial pom.xml has no test dependencies and no test files exist. The project is based on the kranonit/calculator-unit-test-example-java GitHub repository (https://github.com/kranonit/calculator-unit-test-example-java) with modified method names (add/subtract instead of sum/minus) and package structure. The task requires a minimum of 3 JUnit test methods covering the add, subtract, and multiply operations.
